title: Uncertainty-Aware Groundwater Potential Mapping in Arid Basement Terrain Using AHP and Dirichlet-Based Monte Carlo Simulation: Evidence from the Sudanese Nubian Shield
description: SpeakForWater Episode 3: Uncertainty-Aware Groundwater Potential Mapping in Arid Basement Terrain Using AHP and Dirichlet-Based Monte Carlo Simulation: Evidence from the Sudanese Nubian Shield. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
